title: aster foliaceus var. cusickii
intro: Aster foliaceus var. cusickii, also known as Cusick's aster, is a perennial herb native to the northwestern United States and southwestern Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is known to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving pain, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial properties that can aid in wound healing. Aster foliaceus var. cusickii can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and salves, and has been traditionally used by indigenous communities to treat a range of ailments.
